title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from the headset
scenario: Unpairing charge case from Poly Voyager Legend 50 via Clear Trusted Device list results in headset appearing as standalone device on cloud web page
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your phone.
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → Reset Device.
Tap "Clear" next to "Clear Trusted Device list".
Remove the device from the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., Device Settings → Remove Device).
Go to your phone's Bluetooth settings and forget/unpair the Poly Voyager Legend 50.
Log into the Poly cloud web portal and remove the device from the cloud account.
Reconnect the headset to the Poly Studio Mobile app by following the pairing flow.
Open the Poly cloud web portal and view the device details.
expected: The device appears as a standalone headset (headset only) on the cloud web page, showing only headset information and image (no charge case details).
